title: hieracium hilare
intro: Hieracium hilare, also known as yellow hawkweed, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium hilare include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, with the flowers and leaves being the most commonly used parts.
